docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY SHIRAZI, DARIAN WANG, PING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, PING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SHIRAZI, DARIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, PING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED JUN-08-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, PING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIRAZI, DARIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, PING $5,727.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,802.00, UPON RECEIPT OF KEYS FROM PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $5,727.00, PLUS $75.00 COSTS. THE JUDGMENT CONSISTS OF $3,077.00 IN REFUNDED RENT FOR MARCH AND $2,650.00 IN REFUNDED DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
